docket_entries.description: (SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS)- GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-01-2019 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSANG, JACQUELINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS $1,836.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,901.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,450.00 FILED BY TSANG, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-23-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE TSANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE REPRESENTED BY MELISSA SANDOVAL SENIOR ANALYSIS. THE PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT (TELEPHONICALLY) BOTH STIPUALTED TO HAVE JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II HEAR THIS CASE KNOWING THAT HE MAY HAVE FINANICAL INTERESTS PERTAINING TO THE CASE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2019 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF TSANG, JACQUELINE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-11-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR AUG-01-2019 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY TSANG, JACQUELINE VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES. RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE TSANG APPEARED IN PRO PER. APPELLANT/DEFENDANT VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS APPEARED REPRESENTED BY MELISSA SANDOVAL. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELLIOTT MYLES; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (525)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT TSANG, JACQUELINE PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGED DAMAGES - THE TIME TAKEN TO OBTAIN A REPLACEMENT PHONE - ARE NOT LEGALLY COMPENSABLE UNDER THE AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT VOLUNTARILY COMPENSATED PLAINTIFF FOR HER OUT-OF-POCKET EXPENSES, BY PROVIDING AN UPGRADED PHONE AT NO COST, AND REVERSING ALL CONTRACT FEES. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-23-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II TO HEAR THIS CASE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY TSANG, JACQUELINE VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-01-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Respondent/Plaintiff Jacqueline Tsang appeared in pro per.
Appellant/Defendant Verizon Communications appeared in pro per represented by Melissa Sandoval.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties sworn.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles discloses to the parties that he has a Verizon account. The parties acknowledge this and agree to proceed.

Respondent/Plaintiff Ms. Tsang testified on her own behalf.
Ms. Sandoval testified on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Verizon Communications.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Respondent/Plaintiff's Group Exhibit 1: Documents including correspondence with Verizon and Afni, Inc.
Appellant/Defendant's Group Exhibit A: Documents including Emails between the parties and sales tax total due.

Respondent's and Appellant's exhibits retained by the Court.

The matter is taken under submission.
Dept. 525; Judge Pro Tem: Elliott Myles; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-28-2019 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-23-2019 Continued To May-23-19 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
